claim_boundary: Maintainer approval exists for the v0.1.0 GitHub release, TestPyPI, PyPI, and Homebrew publication sequence. Public release readiness remains false until the channel publication steps, registry/formula install-uninstall-smoke proofs, checksum/SBOM/provenance attachment, and post-release verification rows pass. This approval does not allow production, performance, Spark-replacement, object-store, lakehouse, Foundry, broad SQL/DataFrame, or fallback-execution claims.
fallback_boundary: Post-release verification must prove ShardLoom runtime paths keep fallback_attempted=false and external_engine_invoked=false. Package channels cannot add Spark, DataFusion, DuckDB, Polars, pandas, Dask, Velox, Trino, or another external query engine as fallback execution.

verification_rows.required_evidence: clean install transcript, uninstall transcript, package smoke transcript, SBOM/checksum/provenance refs, package-channel readiness report
public package install followed by first-10-minutes commands and transcript
golden workflow validator transcript over the public package or approved release artifact
runtime envelope or Python client smoke showing fallback_attempted=false and external_engine_invoked=false
public docs link/readiness validation after release links are live
website support matrix and benchmark/public-status pages reflect the approved release artifact and claim boundaries
